entry.title: Re: No projects available for my Desktop Agent
entry.content: Hi, thanks for reaching out to us. Based on the screenshot you provided, your project appears to have been deployed, but we cannot check your agent's status and mode. If you can share more details, it will help us investigate further and provide the necessary assistance. Additionally, the link you shared doesn't show any exercises. Could you please double-check the exercise link and share it again?

entry.title: I can't update the duedate and startdate fields with dtw
entry.content: Hİ, I can't update the duedate and startdate fields with dtw in production orders. I get the error "Start date must be later than, or the same as, the document start date [WOR4.StartDate][line: 1]65171" regarding the startdate field. but the date I entered is already later than the start date field. When I enter a previous date, there is no problem. Can you help?

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "ABAP Core Data Services" developer challenge
entry.content:
I am stuck in below point for task 3. Please advise.

  1. Add annotations to provide a value help filter on the ‘Status text’ field based on Overall Status text.

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'CDS View entity'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

@ObjectModel.usageType:{

serviceQuality: #X,

sizeCategory: #S,

dataClass: #MIXED

}

@ui.headerInfo.typeName: 'Travel'

@ui.headerInfo.typeNamePlural: 'Travels'

@Search.searchable: true

@ObjectModel.semanticKey: [ 'Description' ]

 

define view entity Ztravel_entity5 as select from ztravel_new5

association [0..1] to /DMO/I_Overall_Status_VH as _Status on _Status.OverallStatus = $projection.Status

{

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 10 }]

@ui.selectionField: [{ position: 10 }]

key

travel_id as TravelId,

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 20 }]

@Search.defaultSearchElement: true

@Search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.90

description as Description,

@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 30 }]

total_price as TotalPrice,

currency_code as CurrencyCode,

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 40 }]

concat_with_space( cast ( total_price as abap.char(25) ), currency_code, 1) as NewPriceCurrencyCode,

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 50 }]

status as Status,

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 60 }]

@ui.selectionField: [{ position: 20 }]

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: {name: '', element: 'overallStatusText' } }]

_Status._Text.Text as overallStatusText,

_Status

 

}

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Calculated measure in the model o...
entry.content:
Hii Sir,

Lookup not show's Hierarchy level values it's for different uses.

Previous year requires Date to be drilled to the lowest hierarchy level.

Try to Restrict formula it shows all Hierarchy level values in cell.

entry.title: SAP Desktop Agent 3 registration failed
entry.content:
I am using SAP Intelligent RPA Cloud Factory and I recently uninstalled desktop agent 2.0.36.41 to switch to the latest Desktop Version

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-setup-desktop-3-0-agent.html

following the documentation above.

I have downloaded and installed the latest desktop agent 3.31.51

However even after successful authentication with the credentials, I still get the following error.

I have tried registering the agent manually as well as automatically the result however is the same.

The agent either shows the status of "unregistered" or at times "connecting",

Ideally it should have worked and I should have been able to see the registered agent within the factory.

Not sure, what exactly have done incorrectly.

@peterengel @Wolfgang5 @SAPSupport 

please help

entry.title: Re: Announcing - Microsoft AI SDK for SAP
entry.content: Does this SDK works with BTP ABAP Environment?

entry.title: Standard values of activity types not visible in the order-specific routing and in the activity list
entry.content:
Hello DM experts,

The standard values of the activity types are not visible in the order-specific routing and are also not visible in the ‘Activity list’ plug-in.

However, the message type ‘Order download’ shows that the maintained default values for each operation are received in DM. We have also checked the master production routings in DM, in which the standard values are visible.

Thank you in advance for any advice!

Best regards Gizem

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Preview of the App showing all the columns, search and filter options and value help in the CDS view entity:

Regards,
Chandana.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Week Task - 3 Completed 
1. Search enabled for Travel Description. 

2. Value help given for status description field

entry.title: Re: How to trigger an event post Publication is completed
entry.content:
Thanks this worked

Just one more thing to ask what is the recurrence to keep for dummy file while compared to publication

entry.title: Experience with Deleting Company Codes Before Go-Live
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am reaching out to see if anyone in this community has experience with the deletion of company codes in SAP public Cloud before the Go-Live phase. Currently, we only have our Customizing and Test systems in place, and we are considering this action to streamline our setup.

Has anyone successfully deleted company codes in a similar scenario? If so, I would greatly appreciate any insights, best practices, or potential pitfalls to be aware of during this process. Do we need to open an Incident with SAP for the deletion?

Thank you in advance for your assistance and shared experiences.

entry.title: Authorisations for SAP IBP Order Based planning Specific Applications
entry.content:
Hi Experts

Within IBP there are specific Tiles for order based planning, such as View Confirmations, View Gating Factors and projected stock.

These applications are not governed by permission filters and allow all users access the full dataset within the planning area. Any methods or suggestions to segregate visibility within these apps to allow users access to their specific data points?

Kind Regards

Ebrahim

entry.title: Net Working Cycle Time in SAP Signavio Process Intelligence
entry.content:
Hi experts,

is there a way to measure only the actual working days (net working Days) when calculating the cycle time? So that only the days from Mon to Fri are included in the average and Sat and Sun are not taken into account. 

Regards Niels

entry.title: Re: one time customer in create service order app (S/4HANA service)
entry.content: Hello, I encountered the same issue on a project. Did you find a solution to this problem?

entry.title: The Payment Wizard was not executed [Message 3657-5] SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

When executing a payment wizard then facing error like The Payment Wizard was not executed [Message 3657-5]

I have assigned payment method , relevant GL account to business partner and payment method but remain same issue.

Issue : The Payment Wizard was not executed [Message 3657-5]

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: POD flow with movement 631
entry.content:
Hi, you first need to, set up a schedule line category SAP standard is NU (you can copy it and create a new one) so when you post the delivery it goes into transit (indicator T movement 687) then you will need to develop a custom transaction  maybe copy of VLPOD and enhance its functionality where when the POD is done the stock goes from T (transit) back to the warehouse via one material movement and at the same time posts 631 (W - customer consignment) via second material movement. 

Maybe there is another solution but this is how we went around it.

entry.title: Re: I don't understand SSCUI 102281 "Define Approval Proc...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please, follow the latest information from the SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3495751 

3495751 - Document Credit Decision Credit (Define Approval Process assign Approver User ID).

entry.title: Import into SAP from Excel
entry.content:
i All

Please can you help - I am trying to import some BP data using the option in the menu Administration - Data Import/Export - Data Import from Excel.

I have created my import file as a text file and provided the relevant mappings. Having located my text file, I then get the following error message:

Invalid Business Partner Bank record - Row Number 1

The text file only contains three columns which I have mapped to BP Code, BP Name and Foreign Name.

Can anyone assist please.

entry.title: Re: I don't understand SSCUI 102281 "Define Approval Process".
entry.content: This information is old and obsolete after the CE2408.

entry.title: Encountered an error when attempting to retrieve data from the database and convert it to JSON.
entry.content:
I'm tasked with retrieving 10 rows from a table (Item type) and its related tables in SAP Hybris, using the table name (Item type) as a parameter. For example, if the table name is "Product," I need to fetch 10 rows from the "Product" table along with its associated tables.

public List<ItemModel> getLatestItems(String tableName) { //tableName is dynamic
    String queryString = String.format("SELECT {PK} FROM {%s} ORDER BY {creationtime} DESC", tableName);

    FlexibleSearchQuery query = new FlexibleSearchQuery(queryString)error 
    query.setCount(10);  // Limit to 10 rows

    SearchResult<ItemModel> searchResult = flexibleSearchService.search(query);
    return searchResult.getResult();
}

I can fetch the Data through flexible query but it gives the error "Infinite recursion" when conversion it to JSON using ObjectMapper

Note- tableName is dynamic.

Is there any way to solve this or any out of box feature to resolve this?

entry.title: Questions regarding Sucessfactors - Common super domain activation
entry.content:
Hello All-

1-For SAP SuccessFactors without SSO ( users can login to SF using Username & Password) is activating Common super domain mandatory?

2- I have read KBA- 3097769 - IAS / IPS - Is IAS implementation mandatory for all SuccessFactors customers? | SAP Knowledge Base Article   which says IAS is mandatory for CSD . But my customers dev system doesn't have SSO enabled. Do i need to inform customer to link SF with IAS in future? What will happen if customer doesnt use SSO and just uses normal username & password for loggin to SF instance.

 

I am unable to find any information on this so have posted question here.

Please clarify on this.

 

Regards

Karthik G

If

entry.title: Re: Adding elements to Trainer bar

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi,

Can any one help on the third point?

c. Add annotations to provide a value help filter on the ‘Status text’ field based on Overall Status text.

entry.title: Skip workflow for Internal Hire from RCM to EC in Manage Pending Hire
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement where there is a workflow triggered in Employee Central MSS when there is a change like Promotion/Demotion in Employee Central for an employee by managers. This workflow is written using a business rule on Job Information.

However, the same workflow is triggering when an internal candidate is hired as an Internal Hire in manage Pending Hire from Recruiting to EC directly on a job requisition. We don't want the workflow to be triggered in this scenario.

Is there any condition we can add to bifurcate the Manage Pending Hire scenario and EC MSS scenario. Please suggest if you have configured something similar basis your experience.

entry.title: Re: Standard Occupational Classification in SuccessFactors
entry.content: Kathleen2, did your company end up creating a custom field?

entry.title: Re: How to use MAN_CALL to send other document than MSDS

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Preview is not working in IOS Build Ap...
entry.content:
Hello Lohitha,

Thank you for reaching out to us. Are you still experiencing the same issue? We encountered a similar problem last week, but it has since been resolved. Please let us know your current status, and if you are still facing this error, we will assist you further.

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoices for Malaysia: A Guide for Communication Settings in the Cloud Edition
entry.content: Great stuff, so helpful!!

entry.title: Re: Integrating PDF for Outbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hi Adela

Please see this famous blog by our colleague Mahesh

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/cloud-print-manager-for-pull-integration-installation-and-configuration/ba-p/13334437

In the print queue setup you can choose to also save as a PDF file. (see the check box). I had a customer who created a "file listener" job to monitor the share where the PDF would be saved. 

Perhaps you can do something similar with cloud integration (here is an example where they used it to get files from a S3 bucket https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-cloud-integration-read-and-write-files-using-amazonwebservices-s3/ba-p/13509955)

You can see there are several file connectors: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/a9df6e198daf40f49a8d59854fbe2f74/connectivity-options-and-communication-security?locale=en-US

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/a9df6e198daf40f49a8d59854fbe2f74/connecting-customer-system-to-cloud-integration?locale=en-US

 

If none of those options work, you can also consider a side by side extensibility option using the SAP Forms by Adobe service in BTP. In that scenario, you would retrieve the delivery data via public api and use the data to generate the PDF yourself.

There is a sample on the extensibility explorer:

https://extensibilityexplorer.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/ExtensibilityExplorer/#/ExtScenario/2401

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Just Ask with datasphere model
entry.content: Thanks for your follow-up question. Support for synonyms and rules for live Datasphere models is on our roadmap.

entry.title: Re: Switch on gCTS (for existing packages)
entry.content:
Hi Karin,

Thanks for the above post which helped me. I have a question. You mentioned this  : "If in the end you come to the conclusion that you don’t want to continue with gCTS, you can of course switch back to CTS."

Can you please let me know how to Switch back to CTS from gCTS? We are on S4 HANA 2023 initial shipment pack. I have migrated a Z package from CTS to GCTS using objects tab(push objects option) of gcts fiori app. And now we wanted to switch back the same package to CTS.

Can you please help?

Regards,

Sunil

entry.title: Re: Is there any standard options to make a bulletin boar...
entry.content:
Hello Lee,

Thank you for reaching out to us. Unfortunately, we do not currently have standard functions for this. However, you can explore the two blogs below that guide you on integrating ChatGPT to achieve a chat-like experience in Build Apps.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/using-openai-models-in-sap-build-apps/ba-p/13555788

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/chatgpt-latest-ai-model-in-sap-build-apps/ba-p/13560248

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft PowerPoint
entry.content:
Hi @Lothar_Köder ,

Thanks for the reply. I hope you have increased the length and width of the actual image of the widget that you have added. Hence the widget looks changes after refresh. we are working on this feature to improve the quality of image in the upcoming releases. 

Regards,

Ashok R

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft PowerPoint
entry.content:
Thanks @comercial_cinfa for the reply. 

Currently you can apply a filter on the data point selection. Applying additional filters are not yet supported.

Regards,
Ashok R

entry.title: PCOE ::: how to set business hours?
entry.content:
Hi,

as in PCOE check list, I would like to set "business hours" ("Define your regular business hours.") . We are avaiable from Mon to Fri at 09:00-13:00 and 14:00 to 18:00. 13:00-14:00 it's lunch time for us.BP, PCOE, business hours

So, I try to set my organization and customer as:

BP

Could it be OK? Thank you.

Harinandan

entry.title: PR should not allow to change the PR Qty after PO created
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I'm having a requirement to put control on me54n. once PO created user should not allow to change the PR qty details on me54n .

example : suppose I have created the PR with 10 qty and I have done po creation , now again i went to me54n and unrelease the release strategy then change the PR qty from 10 to 15. Now i need a control here , system should not allow the change on PR once PO created.

can anyone help me on this....

entry.title: Re: Issue with long running PAL Function on HANA
entry.content:
I also tried to run it in a jupyter notebook using the hana-ml python package.
Same behavior .. after 1 hour I get a time out ..

ERROR:hana_ml.algorithms.pal.tsa.additive_model_forecast:HANA version: 2.00.075.00.1702888292 (fa/hana2sp07). (423, 'AFL error: ""."(DO statement)": line 18 col 1 (at pos 816): search table error: _SYS_AFL.AFLPAL:ADDITIVE_MODEL_ANALYSIS_ANY: [423] (range 3) AFL error exception: exception 73001066: PAL error[73001066]:Time out: the algorithm has executed with 3600 seconds.\n') Traceback (most recent call last): File "c:\Users\...\AppData\Local\miniconda3\Lib\site-packages\hana_ml\algorithms\pal\tsa\additive_model_forecast.py", line 230, in _fit self._call_pal_auto(conn, File "c:\Users\...\AppData\Local\miniconda3\Lib\site-packages\hana_ml\algorithms\pal\pal_base.py", line 895, in _call_pal_auto self.execute_statement, materialize_dict = call_pal_auto_with_hint(conn_context, ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "c:\Users\...\AppData\Local\miniconda3\Lib\site-packages\hana_ml\algorithms\pal\pal_base.py", line 1403, in call_pal_auto_with_hint if try_exec(cur, sql, conn): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "c:\Users\...\AppData\Local\miniconda3\Lib\site-packages\hana_ml\algorithms\pal\pal_base.py", line 1358, in try_exec cur.execute(sql) hdbcli.dbapi.Error: (423, 'AFL error: ""."(DO statement)": line 18 col 1 (at pos 816): search table error: _SYS_AFL.AFLPAL:ADDITIVE_MODEL_ANALYSIS_ANY: [423] (range 3) AFL error exception: exception 73001066: PAL error[73001066]:Time out: the algorithm has executed with 3600 seconds.\n')

entry.title: DM Manage floor stock Customization
entry.content:
Hello Community!

A customer wanted to do customization on the "manage floor stock" application on DM. They want to assign roll numbers to these rows in the list, Batch Number as unique keys (Inventory ID-Batch Number) and thus they will be able to see in the table which batch goes to which roll. Since the batchNo matches the roll, they planned to be able to see this custom RollNO that will come with the batch while selecting the material in the "load resource with the components" application. But there are these challenges:

1) DM does not let us have change possibilities for manage floor stock on official offers that we can extend with custom extensions** https://github.com/SAP-samples/digital-manufacturing-extension-samples/tree/main/dm-coreplugin-extensions/plugins/webapp

2) In the second way, which is management with custom Pods and APIs instead of standard plugins, there is no Inventory or batch in the Custom Data management to assign it custom data.

Is there a chance to do this in the current system? If so, I kindly ask you to share.

Br,

Emre Yoldas

entry.title: Re: Issue with long running PAL Function on HANA
entry.content: Yes, also when running it directly on hanadb, I still get the timeout.

entry.title: ATLAS 10.1 Change for Imports in Germany Deadline
entry.content:
German customs are saying the deadline of ATLAS 10.1 is 27.10.2024 for the import processes.  With SAP just releasing the OSS Note package within the last few weeks, has anyone been able to get an extension of the deadline?  We are right in the middle of converting from GTS 11.0 to GTS E4H 2023 and cannot meet the deadline.  Currently customs are saying they are providing no extensions of ATLAS 9.1.   

Has anyone been able to get an extension or heard of a possible push of the hard migration deadline by customs?

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect PostgreSQL DB with Visual Studio Cr...
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

In your code comment out the parameter and log on lines.

On the Viewer properties enable Refresh button:

Then run the app again and this time hit the Viewers Refresh button.

Now what do you see?

FYI, if the report is based on a Stored Procedure you must set the Parameter value before setting the log on info.

entry.title: Re: SCC handshake failed: 401 — Unauthorized
entry.content: Thank you Constantin, we had the same problem as the OP, and this worked for us!

entry.title: Re: Account assignment mandatory for material (enter acc....

while i'm creat  po  giveing all data  when click the enter that time gettig error so could not creat the po 

Account assignment mandatory for material 100007021 (enter acc. ass. cat.)

entry.title: Re: Failed to connect to sbocommon on installation
entry.content:
Hi OliveBee

Please try below mentioned solution:

Backup the SBO-Common database;
- Delete the SBO-Common database;
- Recreate the SBO Common from the Package file or Run the Upgrade wizard again, if the SBO-Common is missing the upgrade wizard will recreate it;

Once done, please try to start the installation wizard with "Run as Administrator" on the client machine and see if this helps to perform a successful installation? 

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Re: Client-secret change in every CAP app deploy
entry.content: Because I have different clients such as UI5 and MDK app

entry.content: My submission for this task

entry.title: Re: Store & Manage your Document Attachments through Fiori
entry.content: Hi sunny5, did you find a solution for this? I am facing similar issue. Thanks and KR, Richard

entry.title: Re: Unable to upgrade SAP HANA 2305 to SAP HANA 2405
entry.content:
Hi Krish_SAP

Was the upgrade successful or there were errors in upgrade ?

You could reinstall server tools as mentioned in SAP note 2538555 and check issue again after this.

If facing same issue, please create incident using component SBO-BC.

Thank You.

Kind Regards

Nidhi

entry.title: Re: How to enable QR code in SAP Commerce for an Omni-Channel experience?
entry.content:
Hey @rbhagat

thanks for the post.

I think you made a small mistake in your article.

At start of your article you wrote you will use Barcode4j for QR code creation and you put the Barcode4j dependency to your external-dependencies.

But in your code you are using in method generateQRCodeImage the Class QRCodeWriter.
The QRCodeWriter comes from the library ZXing (com.google.zxing.qrcode.QRCodeWriter) what you mentioned as alternative library.

When you want to use the code above you have to add that to your external-dependencies (dont forget to add to you classpath)

	<dependencies>
		<dependency>
		    <groupId>com.google.zxing</groupId>
		    <artifactId>core</artifactId>
		    <version>3.5.3</version>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
		    <groupId>com.google.zxing</groupId>
		    <artifactId>javase</artifactId>
		    <version>3.5.3</version>
		</dependency>
	</dependencies>

entry.title: Re: How to use MAN_CALL to send other document than MSDS
entry.content:
Hello

you should not use the same report category "MSDS" and you should avoid to use the same business process as with MSDS (e.g. to get a difference e.g. in "CoverSheet" etc.)

I propose the following sequence

1.) check customizing. Here you can define the "cover sheet". Here you will find all the conditions which are allowed in Standard to define a "different" cover sheet; check the options you have there (e.g. you can differentiate by "sales organisation")

2.) you should not mix a "non SDS" like document with "MSDS" as report category. You should specify may be a customer specific report type to assign to the generation variant

3.) check may be: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/e3e7c06560a54d14ba7f4c52a86635da/352bbf53f106b44ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

and the relevant OSS note describing the "report distribution"; this is a "consulting OSS" note. You will find this easily on SAP marketplace

Wish you the best

C.B

entry.title: Reset MFA/2FA: Unable to access Cloud Portal for SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

One of my teammates is unable to login into Cloud Portal due to continuous error during MFA. Could you please help to reset the authentication process for its account?

Thanks in advance!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reset MFA/2FA: Unable to access Cloud Portal for SAP...
entry.content:
Hello!

As per the KBA 3383780 - Mandatory MFA in Cloud Portal - SAP Commerce Cloud, you can reset the MFA/2FA device by having a CUSTOMER_SYS_ADMIN delete & re-create the affected user!

More information on Cloud Portal's roles can be found in Roles in the Cloud Portal.

Kind Regards,
Wesley

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello, thank you for reaching out to us. Unfortunately, we do not have a custom "draw" function available. However, you can refer to the following help blog for guidance on implementing a custom JavaScript function.

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/custom-javascript?locale=en-US&q=custom

entry.title: Re: Manage Preferred Supplier List
entry.content:
Good day Peter,

As per KBA 3488313 - Scope Item Deprecation Retired List 2408 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition scope item 4RI:Preferred Supplier List is no longer available resulting in the app Manage Preferred Supplier List being removed. When you open the excel included in the KBA you see that no Successor has been identified and the reason given is that there are no live customers using this scope item. It was strategic decision of product management to offer 4RI and 4RD only in OP/Private cloud environment. 

If you like to discuss in more detail please do not hesitate to reach out to me via email.

Best regards, Esther

entry.title: Where can I start learning how to create logistics projects in SAP S/4HANA EPPM Project System?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring Logistics Projects in SAP S/4HANA learning journey.

Overview
In this Learning Journey you will learn how to create, plan and execute logistics projects in SAP S/4HANA EPPM Project System. You will experience the end-to-end business process, from creation of projects structures, planning of costs, materials and revenues, to execution of projects, realization of revenues, results analysis and period-end closing.

Learning objectives

Upon completing this Learning Journey you will be able to:

  • Create logistics projects using templates.
  • Create and maintain networks and activities within Work Breakdown Structures (WBS).
  • Carry out cost and revenue planning of logistics projects.
  • Carry out material procurement for logistics projects.
  • Release and execute logistics projects.
  • Run period-end closing activities including results analysis and settle projects to profitability analysis.
  • Use reporting features in SAP S/4HANA to analyzes structure, revenues, costs and contribution margin of logistics projects.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: PO versioning in CIG component
entry.content:
Hi JashShah,

the error message we receive is "Order version of the cancellation order is not the same as the original order: The original order has version (1), while the cancellation order has version (2).

I understand the logic behind. As soon as we do any change in our SAP system, version number is increased in the background. But in those cases change PO is not sent because our backend system does not consider this change to be relevant. Therefore with the next step, PO cancellation, the message is sent with higher version number 2. 

We just can't imagine that all partners do send all changes to Ariba Network, even in case of internal changes. This is why we are asking for best practices or experiences with similar situations.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Debugger: organize the screen
entry.content: Thank you Ulrich, it worked!

entry.title: Re: Client-secret change in every CAP app deploy
entry.content: i am not sure if you get the point, if your app and service are developed in one mta, you don't need destination for it. for stable key, you can manually create key and put them in your destination.

entry.title: Re: PO versioning in CIG component
entry.content: Hi TobiaszWegrzynski. Thank you for your comment. Yes, for both change and new messages the proper settings are done in WE20.

entry.title: DMS: Scan and attach document
entry.content:
Experts,

I have a requirement to scan a document from scanner tray and directly upload in DMS. I searched the forum and found threads which suggested to download Easy DMS from marketplace. 

Currently, I scan the document using a scanner software for Fujitsu scanner, save the file in my desktop as a first step and then attach the document to Business partner via DMS as a second step.

Instead of 2 steps, users wants to directly upload the document from the scanner tray and upload to DMS. 

I believe OpenText is a paid solution from SAP which might help in this regard. Since I just want to attach the document to BP, is there any other alternative option which does not need any 3rd party paid software.

Kindly share your inputs if this requirement is feasible. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Client-secret change in every CAP app deploy
entry.content: If I deployed my app to PRD subaccount, I would created service-key manually. I should do it manually.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 Licensing
entry.content:
This has a lot of great info so book mark this page:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/crystal-reports/faq

1. How does the licensing issue work in both developer mode and deployment mode?

CR has always been a single use license, so you can purchase a copy of CR Designer per user.

More info here:

https://www.sap.com/documents/2015/07/368edae4-597c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

2. Is the issue of concurrent licenses limited as was the case with crystal 8.5?

For CR Server or BOE Enterprise where you publish reports to those platforms you can get Concurrent or User based keycodes to allow/limit the number of users able to log into those applications. Does not limit the use of CR Designer if CR Designer is installed locally.

3.What platforms does Crystal Reports 2020 run on?

See this Platforms info here:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2859510

Crystal Reports 2020

4. On what platforms can deployment be done (Web, Mac, Windows, Linux, etc.)?

CR Designer is a Windows based application, so Windows OS's only.

You can get Crystal Reports Viewer that is WEB based, only allows users to view reports with saved data.

If you want to develop an application using CR's SDK's then you can build the App as a Desktop Or WEB hosted application using RESTful, .NET or Java SDK's

Go here for more info:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CRYSTAL_REPORTS

entry.title: Re: How can MRP exception messages and reschedule dates i...
entry.content: Hello @Chandrashekhar_Sajjan - If I understand correctly, goal of these messages is to identify supply orders which need to be either scheduled to future (i.e., pushed), scheduled closer to the present day (i.e., pulled), or removed as unnecessary (i.e., canceled). Do you know exactly what is the business requirement or where we  want to see these messages because it is just a list of values (i.e. code and descriptions) ?

entry.title: (SAP BEST practice) Cutover process : Activating batch for material
entry.content:
Hi Team 

We are activating batch for material . 

Will like to know the cutover plan suggested by SAP for the same.
Will also like to know how to handle pending invoices ?

entry.title: Precondition is not working in Maintain validation and Substitution rules app when data comes API
entry.content:
Maintain validation and substitution rules app with Precondition working in Manual both in Starter and Customizing System but when we trigger data from API precondition is not working. 

Note: Without precondition this rule working fine from API as well . Is there any way to handle the precondition when data comes from API?

entry.title: Selecting fields from ProductTreeLines inside a ProductTree query with Service Layer API
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm just starting to work with Service Layer, and I found myself with a requirement to filter the fields returned by the Service Layer API.

In this case, we are querying the ProductTrees endpoint, which respond also with the ProductTreeLines.

But we don't want all the ProductTreeLines fields to be responded by the server, we want a subset only.

I know how to select the fields we want from the main entity (ProductTree) using the $select query param, but I'm strugling to select specific fields from the child object (ProductTreeLine).

Is there a way to do this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 Licensing
entry.content:
I'll answer 3 and 4 first because they are the easiest.  Crystal Reports 2020 runs on Windows only.  This is a change from older versions of Crystal Reports.  This applies to both the Crystal Reports Developer and any hosting platform.

Now for licensing, always a sand trap with Business Objects and Crystal Reports.

For developing, there is a user based licensing model.  For each user who uses the Crystal Reports Development tool, they need a license and their own license key.  Depending on the vendor where you get your licenses, these can be purchased in blocks of differing numbers of licenses.

For what you refer to as "deployment mode", I assume you are referring to some platform to host the Crystal Reports and allows users to interact with them by refreshing them and possibly scheduling them.  There are two options, Crystal Reports Server and Business Objects.  I don't know much about Crystal Reports Server as we use Business Objects at my company.  Business Objects is a server installation that allows for the hosting and scheduling of Crystal Reports.  It is currently licensed based on a concurrent or named user model.  What fits best with you installation will need to be determined by you.

I don't know of any limits on concurrent licenses as they would relate to Crystal Reports server or Business Objects.  Those licenses do not allow for editing or creating reports.  There is not a concurrent user license model for the Crystal Reports developer.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi team,

Please find the screenshots below,

All entries

With filer

Regards
Siva G

entry.title: Hash function in SAP IQ
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,
We need to do column level encryption testing basis below methods.

Method 1: AesEncrypt & AesDerypt function based Encryption 
Create views on the base tables and implement AES encryption and decryption functions (AesEncrypt and AesDecrypt) within these views.

Method 2: Hash-Based Encryption
Create views on the base tables and apply HASH functions, such as SHA-1 or SHA-256, within these views.
We need to know how second approach can be implemented here. Can we use hash functions in IQ and since it is not native to IQ how will be the performance?.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Hash function in SAP IQ
entry.content:
Dear Customer ,

Regarding Method 1, I tested HASH function in IQ.

Example : "select UPPER(HASH(CAST((Surname) as VARCHAR(150)), 'SHA-256')) from employees where EmployeeID >= 120"

I can confirm it is not IQ native. The query plan generated is SQL Anywhere plan, not IQ.

See KBA 2271520 How to know if a query is processed by SAP IQ or SQL Anywhere - SAP IQ

Thus performance may be impacted (KBA 2305300 - Hash function in SAP IQ)

The alternative and recommended solution is Method 1 :

Use IQ column encryption with native functions AES_ENCRYPT and AES_DECRYPT 

See

Column Encryption in SAP IQ

KBA 2531882 - How to set up column encryption in SAP IQ 16.x  

Kind Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
@Dhanush-d it is great to engage with you in the community. My name is Stephanie and I'm based in the USA outside of Philadelphia (the city of brotherly love.) May I ask your area of expertise and interest? When you can please check out the location based groups to join. Also, members run fantastic local events. Asia Pacific | Location-Based Groups | SAP Community

PS don't forget to register for SAP TechEd and to block your calendar as you are able Oct 8 & 9 for interactive sessions. Bring your questions to get answered!! SAP TechEd - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: @RakeshNair hi, hope that you are having a great week. Definitely join the SAP TechEd - SAP Community to stay informed, engage with others during your preparation and get ideas for great interactive session!

entry.title: Re: Transport Custom Workflow from development to quality...
entry.content:
Hi George,

I've always transported WFs to QA and on to Prod with transport requests (using SE09 or SE10).   Were you prompted to create a transport when you were developing this workflow?   Have other custom WFs been created/transported from this client in the past?

If you were not prompted to enter/create a transport request when you first saved your WF, then I'd check with the Basis team.  You should NOT create workflows in QA or Prod.  

Good luck,

Sue

 

Sue

entry.title: Re: How to put the BPM Governance Building Blocks to good use
entry.content:
Hi Taryn;

Your blog post offers an excellent guide to implementing good governance in Business Process Management (BPM). It effectively outlines practical steps such as establishing process maps, leveraging existing tools and methodologies, and focusing on data-driven analytics. The emphasis on creating a standard taxonomy and continuous monitoring is particularly insightful.

I’m excited to read your next blog on the Process Management Lifecycle and tooling—your approach promises to provide even more valuable insights.

entry.title: Can we filter for null values in Fiori elements?
entry.content:
I have a Fiori elements app, using a CDS based v2 OData service. One of the filters is a date field, and I would like to apply a filter where Date is null (empty, no value present). Setting the filters as <empty> using the default value help generates an OData request with the right format.

$filter=SalesOrganization eq '1000' and BookingInDate eq null

The result is no rows.

When I look for a particular document, which I know has an empty date, this is what I see in the console.

 

{
...
"BookingInDate":null
...
}

 

 The table has null, the OData service returns null, the filter applies null, but for some reason these nulls are not treated as equal when filtering.

Does anyone have any suggestions on how to filter for null dates?

We are casting null as a default date value (01-01-1900), and then filtering for this value to see rows that match. Surely there has to be a better way, right?

entry.title: India TCS Form 27EQ - Remmitance Challan Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

We've posted a customer invoice with the TCS withholding tax codes maintained in the master data. But when we are trying to create the "Remittance Challan - TCS (Customers)", we are getting an error message the "No unpaid tax line exists for the given selection criteria" after providing the necessary details in the selection screen. The Business place and section codes have been given at the time of invoicing, the withholding is also getting calculated for customer invoices but the documents are not getting picked up at the time of "Remmitance".

Note,

All the configurations related to TCS and Extended withholding tax has been configured in the "Sandbox" system. The Business Place is also maintained and is assigned to the section codes. 

Can anyone please help us in resolving this issue. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Transport Custom Workflow from development to quality...
Re: Transport Custom Workflow from development to quality...
entry.content:
Hello Sue, thank you for the quick reply.

Yes I was prompted to create a transport request when I first saved my workflow and I created one. Then this transport request was ''transported'' with se10.
But the transport had inside this:

View Maintenance: Data

SWFDVEVTY2

SWFDEVENA

100BOBUS2030 CREATED WS9980

SWFDEVTYP

100BOBUS2030 CREATED WS9980


No, I think it's the first time that a workflow template is transported from development to quality server.
When I create one I save it as Local (without a specific package, is this maybe the problem?)

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - EWM Goods Receipt Failed
entry.content:
is HU internally created or coming from other system -- You may want to review the number range you set up for HU.

Refer GS1-128 Barcode Understanding and Technical Detail... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Vendor Master Workflow is not triggered successfully
entry.content:
If you can recreate this scenario in your Dev environment, you can temporarily change any of the background tasks to be dialog, with yourself as the agent. Then set a breakpoint within the method (perhpas Get VM items) and you can debug to your hearts content. But of course, don't forget to switch the task BACK to a background task and save. It would not be good to transport that to a different environment.

Also, if you cannot recreate the scenario in Dev, you can still set a breakpoint in the Get VM items method, and debug from the BOR.  This might not show you everything you need if the master data is changed, but it's a place to start.

entry.title: Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP ABAP Environment #16
entry.content:
👉 The call for contributions for one of the upcoming roundtables is open! 

 

If you want to show a demo or share a use case scenario for SAP BTP ABAP Environment send us an email and we will get back to you.
 

Introduction

 

As SAP BTP ABAP environment (aka Steampunk) and ABAP Cloud became more and more popular inside and outside of SAP, there is a high demand for rolling out the latest product news and updates, asking questions, and of course showing demos. 

💡 If you weren’t able to join one of our previous roundtables, you can find the slides presented, recordings, and further references in this GitHub repository.


Meeting Information

When:                                                                      
  • September 19th, 10:00 - 11:00 AM CET  – Zoom Meeting (please register in advance) 
 
Who:
  • All interested customers, partners, and stakeholders are invited to join and exchange ideas and feedback with others and the product team
  • Steampunk team: Frank Jentsch (Product Lead for SAP BTP ABAP Environment), Iwona Hahn & Burcu Karlidag (Product Management), Timm Falter (Area Product Owner for Data Integration and CDS), and Arne Harren (Architect in the Data Integration and CDS area).

Preliminary Agenda:
  • Product news
  • SQL-based Data Integration with SQL Services and CDS External Entities incl. demo
  • Q&A
Looking forward to meeting you!
 


Check out our SAP Business Technology ABAP Environment page in SAP Community for product updates and upcoming events.

entry.title: Re: Issue in PO while sending the data to JDBC postgreSQl DB
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

Thanks for your response.

PostgreSql by default converts everything to lower case(Table Names and Column Names).However PostgreSQL schema has case sensitive table and column names. When we try to push data from SAP to PostgreSQL we are seeing an error like Table name does not exists. Eg: postgreSQL Table name: countryCode but SAP PO postgre connection is trying to find countrycode


We need SAP PO to find table name as countryCode as is


Please suggest if can use any parameters in the JDBC postgreSQL connection string or if there is way to define double quote("") for the table and column names for the data types or anywhere else etc.,

We are currently using the above datatype for which is connected to SQLDB and is working as expected.

Now we are using the same structure for sending data to postgreSQL DB its failing and we have checked our driver installation & config and channel configuration is good.

As per DB team info, if we can send data as "Office"(Table Name) and "OfficeName"(Column Name) in double quote then they able to see/receive data.

So is there any way that we can add double quotes for table and column names for DataTypes.

Else please suggest any solution for this issue.

Thanks,

Vidya.

entry.content:

How can I counteract this? Do further settings need to be made here?

Thanks for your support.

Best regards

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Future of SAP Landscape Management
entry.content:

and
"SAP Landscape Management Cloud becomes the automation solution for customer-operated SAP landscapes beyond 2027. "

is no more with the announcement  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-landscape-management-cloud-discontinued/ba-p/13759530

entry.title: Re: Issue in PO while sending the data to JDBC postgreSQl DB
entry.content:
I would try this SQL_QUERY option to see if it solves your case sensitivity problem - https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-US/44/7b7855fde93673e10000000a114a6b/content.htm?no_cache=true

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby
